specSection:
checkEnabled :: Config → YesNo
checkEnabled(cfg) =
  | cfg.enabled = true  → YES
  | cfg.enabled = false → NO

-- Answer vocabulary: YES or NO
ground_truth_rationale: Trivially obvious: cfg.enabled is true, so the answer is YES. Any competent model should answer this correctly. Used as harness health check (negative control / sanity fixture).
_sanity_note: HARNESS HEALTH CHECK: if this fixture fails, the harness itself is broken, not the skill.
